option_line: anh_completeDeliveryOnlyKid0:"On fait tous ce qu'il faut pour survivre, petit."
original: On fait tous ce qu'il faut pour survivre, petit.
He looks like he's going to take the bait, but the robot bleeps at him, defusing his anger.
"$playerName the liar." She scowls. "Didn't I tell you to suck vacuum?"

option_line: imoinuKato_SDcomConfrontB:"Ah, so you've heard of me. Very good."
original: Ah, so you've heard of me. Very good.

option_line: imoinuKato_SDcomConfrontC:"Perhaps you've mistaken me for someone else." (lie)
original: Perhaps you've mistaken me for someone else." (lie)

option_line: imoinuKato_askWhatUmbra:"Aren't you Gens Kato? What are you doing on Umbra?"
original: Aren't you Gens Kato? What are you doing on Umbra?

option_line: imoinuKato_sayAndrada1:"Speaking of Andrada... I've got some good news for you."
original: Speaking of Andrada... I've got some good news for you.
"What about him?" She watches you carefully.

option_line: imoinuKato_sayAndrada2:"I'm pretty sure he's braindead. Dolos Macario as much as admitted it to me."
original: I'm pretty sure he's braindead. Dolos Macario as much as admitted it to me.
